content: Just as 2024–2025 state-of-the-art active learning agent memory systems dynamically prioritize and retain only the most uncertainty-reducing experiences to avoid catastrophic forgetting and improve sample efficiency, general purpose AI agents can be redesigned to route the high-curiosity, low-prediction-confidence exploratory experiences generated by curiosity-driven methods like ICM and RND directly into the persistent, prioritized active memory buffer, rather than discarding them after exploration. This creates a self-reinforcing cycle where open-ended exploration directly improves the agent’s future active learning performance by seeding its memory with high-value ambiguous experiences.
